ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "tsid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the test suite (e.g., navigate, input, clickButton) */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object or element associated with the test suite (e.g., testSiteURL, input_login_username_ID) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the test suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the test suite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the test suite was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* The version number of the test suite */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the test suite (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* The testing framework used (e.g., Selenium, Appium, JUnit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tsid")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "tcid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "tsid" TEXT /* Reference to the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "data_column_name" TEXT /* Data column name associated with the test case (e.g., Username, Password) */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the test case (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional tags for categorization (e.g., smoke, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tcid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_tsid FOREIGN KEY ("tsid") REFERENCES test_suites ("tsid")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "tcid" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case the step belongs to */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* The order of the step within the test case */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action to be performed (e.g., navigate, input, clickButton) */,
  "object" TEXT /* The object or element associated with the step */,
  "data" TEXT /* Any data needed for the step (e.g., input value) */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* The expected result of the step */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the step was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_tcid FOREIGN KEY ("tcid") REFERENCES test_cases ("tcid")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "tcid" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case executed */,
  "tsid" TEXT /* Reference to the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* The user who executed the test case */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the test case was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* The result of the test case execution (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the execution (e.g., error messages, logs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_tsid FOREIGN KEY ("tsid") REFERENCES test_suites ("tsid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_tcid FOREIGN KEY ("tcid") REFERENCES test_cases ("tcid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., test engineer, QA manager, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test execution */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test step */,
  "result" TEXT /* The result of the step execution (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the step execution (e.g., error messages, logs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES test_steps ("step_id")
)
